sglang.title: fix overlap pagecount
sglang.author: pansicheng
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

While the KV cache for a request should normally be the total length of the request minus 1, when enable_overlap is active, req.seqlen does not include the token generated in the previous inference round (t-1) due to the overlap between CPU scheduling and GPU inference. As a result, duri

sglang.title: fix: Fix CI test_function_call_parser.py
sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Fix CI
If there is already a tool, the next token can be simply a tool_call_separator, before following with a {.
This check was originally covered in L114, but it was changed in bec5891 then the CI failed

sglang.title: feat(oai refactor): Replace `openai_api` with `entrypoints/openai`
sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR aims to refactor and modernize the OpenAI API implementation in SGLang by removing the legacy openai_api module and consolidating it into the entrypoints/openai structure.

Modifications
1. Remove Legacy OpenAI API Module

Removed sglang/srt/openai_api directory (commit 5a7df078)

sglang.title: Refactor LoRAManager and LoRAMemoryPool state management logic for dynamic LoRA loading support
sglang.author: lifuhuang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This is the first PR for supporting #2686.
Due to the complexity of the change, I plan to introduce the change in 2-3 pull requests to simplify code reviews, verification, and conflict resolution. At high level, they are expected to happen in following steps:

(This PR) Refactor LoRAManag

sglang.title: refactor(test): reorganize OpenAI test file structure
sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR aims to reorganize the OAI test suites for better tests management.
Thanks to @key4ng's suggestion

Modifications


Introduce a hierarchical directory structure under test/srt/openai to group tests by functionality:

basic/: For fundamental OpenAI API compatibility tests (completi

sglang.title: Tiny add logging for GC
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Use this to quickly debug whether some stuck is caused by GC. (e.g. once I saw slow gc caused by a seemingly normal mooncake small change)

Modifications
